description: A project involves replacing an old, out-of-warranty network switch with a new one during a weekend maintenance window.

nodes.task_description: Back up the configuration of the old switch.
Translate and apply the configuration to the new switch.

expected_outcome.value: The new switch is configured with all the necessary VLANs, ports, and settings.

nodes.task_description: During the maintenance window, physically swap the old switch with the new one and test connectivity.

expected_outcome.value: The new switch is online and network functionality is restored.
